final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic still, space exploration editorial
Primary request: astronaut floating in Earth orbit with the Milky Way and nebulae behind, partial space station visible at frame edge
Scene/backdrop: low Earth orbit, planet Earth curvature below, dense star field with colorful nebula clouds, distant space station modules
Subject: astronaut in detailed spacesuit with reflective visor, floating weightless, suit fabric texture and joint mechanisms clearly visible
Style/medium: photorealistic digital painting, NASA documentary style, cinematic space art
Composition/framing: medium shot with astronaut centered, Earth reflection in visor, space station structures at left/right edges creating depth
Lighting/mood: soft blue-white Earthshine illuminating the suit from below, deep space blackness contrasted with bright galactic core, awe-inspiring and majestic atmosphere
Color palette: deep space blacks + vibrant nebula purples/pinks/blues + warm Earth blues and greens + metallic silver suit
Materials/textures: matte white spacesuit fabric with fabric weave, reflective gold visor coating, metallic space station panels, volumetric nebula gas
Constraints: keep Earth as secondary element, ensure astronaut remains focal point, maintain scientific accuracy in suit design
Avoid: cartoonish proportions, flat lighting, oversaturated colors, lens flare abuse, watermark
